title: Backup & Restore
description: Perintah untuk backup dan restore database MySQL.

commands.name: mysqldump
commands.title: mysqldump
commands.description: Membuat backup database dalam format SQL.
commands.examples:
mysqldump -u root -p myapp > backup.sql
mysqldump -u root -p --single-transaction myapp > backup.sql
mysqldump -u root -p --all-databases > all_backup.sql
mysqldump -u root -p --no-data myapp > schema.sql
mysqldump -u root -p --routines --triggers myapp > full_backup.sql
mysqldump -u root -p myapp | gzip > backup.sql.gz
commands.notes: Selalu gunakan --single-transaction untuk InnoDB agar backup konsisten.

commands.name: mysql-restore
commands.title: Restore Database
commands.description: Mengembalikan database dari file backup SQL.
commands.examples:
mysql -u root -p myapp < backup.sql
gunzip < backup.sql.gz | mysql -u root -p myapp
mysql -u root -p < all_backup.sql
commands.notes: Pastikan database target sudah dibuat sebelum restore (kecuali backup mengandung CREATE DATABASE).

commands.name: SELECT INTO OUTFILE
commands.title: Export ke CSV
commands.description: Mengekspor hasil query ke file CSV.
commands.syntax: SELECT ... INTO OUTFILE 'path' FIELDS TERMINATED BY ',' ENCLOSED BY '"' LINES TERMINATED BY '\n';
commands.examples:
SELECT * FROM users
INTO OUTFILE '/tmp/users.csv'
FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
ENCLOSED BY '"'
LINES TERMINATED BY '\n';
commands.notes: File ditulis di server MySQL (bukan client). Perlu FILE privilege.

commands.name: LOAD DATA
commands.title: Import dari CSV
commands.description: Mengimpor data dari file CSV ke tabel.
commands.syntax: LOAD DATA [LOCAL] INFILE 'path' INTO TABLE tabel FIELDS TERMINATED BY ',' ENCLOSED BY '"' LINES TERMINATED BY '\n' IGNORE 1 ROWS;
commands.examples:
LOAD DATA LOCAL INFILE '/tmp/users.csv'
INTO TABLE users
FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
ENCLOSED BY '"'
LINES TERMINATED BY '\n'
IGNORE 1 ROWS;
commands.notes: LOAD DATA sangat cepat untuk import data massal.
